cases.question: 目前数据库里一共有多少个客户？
cases.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS 客户总数 FROM KNA1

cases.question: 销售订单一共有多少张？
cases.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS 销售订单总数 FROM VBAK

cases.question: 查一下所有供应商的编号和名称
cases.sql: SELECT LIFNR, NAME1 FROM LFA1

cases.question: 查一下 2025 年的销售订单数量和总金额
cases.sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT VBAK.VBELN) AS 订单数量, SUM(VBAK.NETWR) AS 总金额
FROM VBAK
WHERE VBAK.ERDAT >= '2025-01-01' AND VBAK.ERDAT <= '2025-12-31'

cases.question: 按物料类型统计每种类型的物料数量
cases.sql:
SELECT MTART, COUNT(MATNR) AS MATERIAL_COUNT
FROM MARA
GROUP BY MTART
ORDER BY MTART

cases.question: 用 CNY 币种结算的销售订单一共多少张，总净额多少？
cases.sql:
SELECT 
    COUNT(DISTINCT VBAK.VBELN) AS 订单数量,
    SUM(VBAK.NETWR) AS 总净额
FROM VBAK
WHERE VBAK.WAERK = 'CNY'

cases.question: 销售额前 5 名的客户是谁，分别销售了多少钱？
cases.sql:
SELECT 
    KNA1.KUNNR AS 客户编号,
    KNA1.NAME1 AS 客户名称,
    ROUND(SUM(VBAK.NETWR), 2) AS 销售总额
FROM VBAK
JOIN KNA1 ON VBAK.KUNNR = KNA1.KUNNR
GROUP BY KNA1.KUNNR, KNA1.NAME1
ORDER BY SUM(VBAK.NETWR) DESC
LIMIT 5

cases.question: 采购金额最高的 3 个供应商及其名称
cases.sql:
SELECT LFA1.LIFNR AS 供应商编号,
       LFA1.NAME1 AS 供应商名称,
       ROUND(SUM(EKPO.NETPR * EKPO.MENGE), 2) AS 采购总金额
FROM EKPO
JOIN EKKO ON EKKO.EBELN = EKPO.EBELN
JOIN LFA1 ON LFA1.LIFNR = EKKO.LIFNR
GROUP BY LFA1.LIFNR, LFA1.NAME1
ORDER BY 采购总金额 DESC
LIMIT 3

cases.question: 今年（2026）每个月的销售订单数量分别是多少？
cases.sql:
SELECT strftime('%m', ERDAT) AS 月份, COUNT(*) AS 订单数量
FROM VBAK
WHERE ERDAT >= '2026-01-01' AND ERDAT < '2027-01-01'
GROUP BY strftime('%m', ERDAT)
ORDER BY 月份

cases.question: 销售数量最高的 5 个物料，列出物料编号、中文名称和销售总数量
cases.sql:
SELECT VBAP.MATNR, MAKT.MAKTX AS 中文名称, SUM(VBAP.KWMENG) AS 销售总数量
FROM VBAP
LEFT JOIN MAKT ON VBAP.MATNR = MAKT.MATNR AND MAKT.SPRAS = '1'
GROUP BY VBAP.MATNR, MAKT.MAKTX
ORDER BY 销售总数量 DESC
LIMIT 5

cases.question: 上个月（2026 年 4 月）销售净额最高的 5 个客户的名称、所在城市和销售总额
cases.sql:
SELECT 
  KNA1.NAME1 AS 客户名称,
  KNA1.ORT01 AS 所在城市,
  ROUND(SUM(VBAP.NETWR), 2) AS 销售总额
FROM VBAP
INNER JOIN VBAK ON VBAK.VBELN = VBAP.VBELN
INNER JOIN KNA1 ON KNA1.KUNNR = VBAK.KUNNR
WHERE VBAK.ERDAT >= '2026-04-01' AND VBAK.ERDAT < '2026-05-01'
GROUP BY KNA1.KUNNR, KNA1.NAME1, KNA1.ORT01
ORDER BY 销售总额 DESC
LIMIT 5

cases.question: 查一下供应商 V010001 采购过哪些物料（要中文名称），以及每种物料采购了多少数量
cases.sql:
SELECT EKPO.MATNR, MAKT.MAKTX AS 物料中文名称, SUM(EKPO.MENGE) AS 总采购数量, EKPO.MEINS AS 单位
FROM EKPO
JOIN EKKO ON EKPO.EBELN = EKKO.EBELN
LEFT JOIN MAKT ON EKPO.MATNR = MAKT.MATNR AND MAKT.SPRAS = '1'
WHERE EKKO.LIFNR = 'V010001'
GROUP BY EKPO.MATNR, MAKT.MAKTX, EKPO.MEINS
ORDER BY 总采购数量 DESC

cases.question: 今年销售额前 5 的客户，列出客户名称、订单数、总销售额和平均单笔金额
cases.sql:
SELECT
    K.NAME1 AS 客户名称,
    COUNT(DISTINCT V.VBELN) AS 订单数,
    ROUND(SUM(V.NETWR), 2) AS 总销售额,
    ROUND(SUM(V.NETWR) / COUNT(DISTINCT V.VBELN), 2) AS 平均单笔金额
FROM VBAK V
JOIN KNA1 K ON V.KUNNR = K.KUNNR
WHERE V.ERDAT >= '2026-01-01'
  AND V.ERDAT < '2027-01-01'
GROUP BY K.KUNNR, K.NAME1
ORDER BY 总销售额 DESC
LIMIT 5

cases.question: 2025 年公司代码 1000 的财务凭证里，借方总金额是多少？
cases.sql:
SELECT SUM(BSEG.DMBTR) AS DEBIT_TOTAL
FROM BSEG
JOIN BKPF ON BSEG.BUKRS = BKPF.BUKRS
         AND BSEG.BELNR = BKPF.BELNR
         AND BSEG.GJAHR = BKPF.GJAHR
WHERE BSEG.BUKRS = '1000'
  AND BSEG.SHKZG = 'S'
  AND BKPF.BUDAT BETWEEN '2025-01-01' AND '2025-12-31'

cases.question: 对比 2025 年销售订单总额和采购订单总额，哪一边更高
cases.sql:
SELECT
  '销售订单' AS 类型,
  SUM(NETWR) AS 总额
FROM VBAK
WHERE ERDAT >= '2025-01-01' AND ERDAT < '2026-01-01'
UNION ALL
SELECT
  '采购订单' AS 类型,
  SUM(MENGE * NETPR) AS 总额
FROM EKPO
WHERE EBELN IN (
  SELECT EBELN FROM EKKO
  WHERE AEDAT >= '2025-01-01' AND AEDAT < '2026-01-01'
)

cases.question: 采购订单总额前 3 的供应商，列出供应商名称和金额
cases.sql:
SELECT LFA1.NAME1 AS 供应商名称, ROUND(SUM(EKPO.NETPR * EKPO.MENGE), 2) AS 采购总额
FROM EKPO
JOIN EKKO ON EKPO.EBELN = EKKO.EBELN
JOIN LFA1 ON EKKO.LIFNR = LFA1.LIFNR
GROUP BY LFA1.LIFNR, LFA1.NAME1
ORDER BY 采购总额 DESC
LIMIT 3

cases.question: 成品物料里毛重最大的前 5 种，给我物料编号、中文名称和毛重
cases.sql:
SELECT M.MATNR, T.MAKTX AS 中文名称, M.BRGEW AS 毛重
FROM MARA M
LEFT JOIN MAKT T ON M.MATNR = T.MATNR AND T.SPRAS = '1'
WHERE M.MTART = 'FERT'
  AND M.BRGEW IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY M.BRGEW DESC
LIMIT 5

cases.question: 财务凭证里凭证币种金额（原币）最大的 10 条记录，列出公司代码、凭证号、币种和金额
cases.sql: SELECT BSEG.BUKRS, BSEG.BELNR, BSEG.WAERS, BSEG.WRBTR FROM BSEG ORDER BY BSEG.WRBTR DESC LIMIT 10

cases.question: 行项目数最多的 5 张销售订单，列出订单号和行项目数
cases.sql:
SELECT VBAK.VBELN AS 订单号, COUNT(VBAP.POSNR) AS 行项目数
FROM VBAK
JOIN VBAP ON VBAK.VBELN = VBAP.VBELN
GROUP BY VBAK.VBELN
ORDER BY 行项目数 DESC
LIMIT 5

cases.question: 查一下我们的大客户名单
cases.sql:
SELECT
  K.KUNNR AS 客户编号,
  K.NAME1 AS 客户名称,
  K.LAND1 AS 国家,
  K.ORT01 AS 城市,
  ROUND(SUM(VB.NETWR), 2) AS 总销售额,
  V.WAERK AS 币种
FROM VBAK V
JOIN KNA1 K ON V.KUNNR = K.KUNNR
JOIN VBAP VB ON V.VBELN = VB.VBELN
GROUP BY K.KUNNR, K.NAME1, K.LAND1, K.ORT01, V.WAERK
ORDER BY SUM(VB.NETWR) DESC
LIMIT 20

cases.question: 查一下哪些物料从来没被销售过
cases.sql:
SELECT
    M.MATNR AS 物料编号,
    MT.MAKTX AS 物料描述,
    M.MTART AS 物料类型,
    M.MATKL AS 物料组,
    M.MEINS AS 基本计量单位,
    M.ERSDA AS 创建日期
FROM MARA M
LEFT JOIN MAKT MT ON M.MATNR = MT.MATNR AND MT.SPRAS = '1'
WHERE M.MATNR NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT MATNR
    FROM VBAP
    WHERE MATNR IS NOT NULL
)
ORDER BY M.ERSDA DESC

cases.question: 找出近两年没下过任何采购订单的僵尸供应商
cases.sql:
SELECT LFA1.LIFNR AS 供应商编号,
       LFA1.NAME1 AS 供应商名称,
       LFA1.LAND1 AS 国家,
       LFA1.ORT01 AS 城市,
       LFA1.ERDAT AS 创建日期
FROM LFA1
WHERE LFA1.LIFNR NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT EKKO.LIFNR
    FROM EKKO
    WHERE EKKO.AEDAT >= '2024-05-20'
)
ORDER BY LFA1.ERDAT DESC

cases.question: 销售额排名在后 50% 的长尾客户有多少个
cases.sql:
WITH customer_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        VBAK.KUNNR,
        SUM(VBAP.NETWR) AS total_sales
    FROM VBAK
    INNER JOIN VBAP ON VBAK.VBELN = VBAP.VBELN
    GROUP BY VBAK.KUNNR
),
ranked_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        KUNNR,
        total_sales,
        SUM(total_sales) OVER (ORDER BY total_sales DESC) AS running_total,
        SUM(total_sales) OVER () AS grand_total
    FROM customer_sales
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS long_tail_customer_count
FROM ranked_sales
WHERE (running_total - total_sales) / grand_total >= 0.5
   OR (running_total / grand_total > 0.5 AND (running_total - total_sales) / grand_total < 0.5)

cases.question: 查一下有没有同名但客户编号不同的客户，可能是数据质量问题
cases.sql:
SELECT KUNNR, NAME1, LAND1, ORT01, REGIO, STRAS
FROM KNA1
WHERE NAME1 IN (
    SELECT NAME1
    FROM KNA1
    GROUP BY NAME1
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT KUNNR) > 1
)
ORDER BY NAME1, KUNNR

cases.question: 对比 2026 年和 2025 年，销售额同比增长最高的前 5 个客户
cases.sql:
SELECT 
    K.KUNNR,
    K.NAME1,
    SUM(CASE WHEN V.ERDAT >= '2025-01-01' AND V.ERDAT < '2026-01-01' THEN VP.NETWR ELSE 0 END) AS SALES_2025,
    SUM(CASE WHEN V.ERDAT >= '2026-01-01' AND V.ERDAT < '2027-01-01' THEN VP.NETWR ELSE 0 END) AS SALES_2026,
    ROUND(
        (SUM(CASE WHEN V.ERDAT >= '2026-01-01' AND V.ERDAT < '2027-01-01' THEN VP.NETWR ELSE 0 END) 
         - SUM(CASE WHEN V.ERDAT >= '2025-01-01' AND V.ERDAT < '2026-01-01' THEN VP.NETWR ELSE 0 END))
        / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN V.ERDAT >= '2025-01-01' AND V.ERDAT < '2026-01-01' THEN VP.NETWR ELSE 0 END), 0)
        * 100, 2
    ) AS GROWTH_PCT
FROM VBAK V
JOIN VBAP VP ON V.VBELN = VP.VBELN
JOIN KNA1 K ON V.KUNNR = K.KUNNR
WHERE V.ERDAT >= '2025-01-01' AND V.ERDAT < '2027-01-01'
GROUP BY K.KUNNR, K.NAME1
HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN V.ERDAT >= '2025-01-01' AND V.ERDAT < '2026-01-01' THEN VP.NETWR ELSE 0 END) > 0
ORDER BY GROWTH_PCT DESC
LIMIT 5

cases.question: 今年每月销售额的环比增长率
cases.sql:
WITH monthly_sales AS (
  SELECT 
    STRFTIME('%Y-%m', ERDAT) AS 月份,
    SUM(NETWR) AS 销售额
  FROM VBAK
  WHERE ERDAT >= '2025-01-01' 
    AND ERDAT <= '2026-05-20'
  GROUP BY STRFTIME('%Y-%m', ERDAT)
)
SELECT 
  月份,
  销售额,
  ROUND(
    (销售额 - LAG(销售额) OVER (ORDER BY 月份)) / LAG(销售额) OVER (ORDER BY 月份) * 100, 
    2
  ) AS 环比增长率_percent
FROM monthly_sales
ORDER BY 月份

cases.question: 2025 和 2026 两年分别采购了多少种不同的物料
cases.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(STRFTIME('%Y', EKKO.AEDAT) AS TEXT) AS YEAR,
    COUNT(DISTINCT EKPO.MATNR) AS DISTINCT_MATERIAL_COUNT
FROM EKKO
INNER JOIN EKPO ON EKKO.EBELN = EKPO.EBELN
WHERE EKKO.AEDAT >= '2025-01-01'
  AND EKKO.AEDAT < '2027-01-01'
GROUP BY STRFTIME('%Y', EKKO.AEDAT)
ORDER BY YEAR

cases.question: 对比 2026 年 Q1 和 2025 年 Q4 的销售订单数量
cases.sql:
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN VBAK.ERDAT >= '2026-01-01' AND VBAK.ERDAT <= '2026-03-31' THEN '2026 Q1'
    WHEN VBAK.ERDAT >= '2025-10-01' AND VBAK.ERDAT <= '2025-12-31' THEN '2025 Q4'
  END AS QUARTER,
  COUNT(DISTINCT VBAK.VBELN) AS ORDER_COUNT
FROM VBAK
WHERE VBAK.ERDAT BETWEEN '2025-10-01' AND '2026-03-31'
GROUP BY QUARTER
ORDER BY QUARTER

cases.question: 物料 M000001 在 2024、2025、2026 三年的采购单价分别是多少（按年取平均）
cases.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(STRFTIME('%Y', EKKO.AEDAT) AS INTEGER) AS 年份,
    ROUND(AVG(EKPO.NETPR), 2) AS 平均采购单价,
    EKPO.WAERS AS 币种
FROM EKPO
JOIN EKKO ON EKPO.EBELN = EKKO.EBELN
WHERE EKPO.MATNR = 'M000001'
  AND EKKO.AEDAT >= '2024-01-01'
  AND EKKO.AEDAT < '2027-01-01'
GROUP BY STRFTIME('%Y', EKKO.AEDAT), EKPO.WAERS
ORDER BY 年份

cases.question: 销售额前 10 的客户，列出客户名称、所在城市和销售总额
cases.sql:
SELECT KNA1.NAME1 AS 客户名称, KNA1.ORT01 AS 所在城市, SUM(VBAK.NETWR) AS 销售总额
FROM VBAK
JOIN KNA1 ON VBAK.KUNNR = KNA1.KUNNR
GROUP BY VBAK.KUNNR
ORDER BY 销售总额 DESC
LIMIT 10

cases.question: 每个供应商各采购了哪些物料类型，按供应商和物料类型分组统计采购数量
cases.sql:
SELECT
  LFA1.LIFNR AS 供应商编号,
  LFA1.NAME1 AS 供应商名称,
  MARA.MTART AS 物料类型,
  SUM(EKPO.MENGE) AS 采购总数量,
  EKPO.MEINS AS 单位
FROM EKKO
JOIN EKPO ON EKKO.EBELN = EKPO.EBELN
JOIN MARA ON EKPO.MATNR = MARA.MATNR
JOIN LFA1 ON EKKO.LIFNR = LFA1.LIFNR
GROUP BY LFA1.LIFNR, LFA1.NAME1, MARA.MTART, EKPO.MEINS
ORDER BY LFA1.LIFNR, MARA.MTART

cases.question: 2025 年按物料类型分组，哪种物料类型的销售总额最高，列出物料类型和销售总额
cases.sql:
SELECT
    MARA.MTART AS 物料类型,
    SUM(VBAP.NETWR) AS 销售总额
FROM VBAP
INNER JOIN MARA ON VBAP.MATNR = MARA.MATNR
INNER JOIN VBAK ON VBAP.VBELN = VBAK.VBELN
WHERE VBAK.ERDAT >= '2025-01-01'
  AND VBAK.ERDAT < '2026-01-01'
GROUP BY MARA.MTART
ORDER BY 销售总额 DESC

cases.question: 在系统里建过档但 2026 年从没下过订单的客户有多少个
cases.sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT K.KUNNR) AS 客户数
FROM KNA1 K
WHERE K.KUNNR NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT V.KUNNR
    FROM VBAK V
    WHERE V.ERDAT >= '2026-01-01' AND V.ERDAT <= '2026-12-31'
)

cases.question: 既被销售过又被采购过的物料有多少种
cases.sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT V.MATNR) AS 物料种类数
FROM VBAP V
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM EKPO E WHERE E.MATNR = V.MATNR
)

cases.question: 2025 年的销售净额最高的前 5 个客户，列出客户名称和销售总额
cases.sql:
SELECT KNA1.NAME1 AS 客户名称, SUM(VBAP.NETWR) AS 销售总额
FROM VBAK
JOIN VBAP ON VBAK.VBELN = VBAP.VBELN
JOIN KNA1 ON VBAK.KUNNR = KNA1.KUNNR
WHERE VBAK.ERDAT >= '2025-01-01' AND VBAK.ERDAT <= '2025-12-31'
GROUP BY KNA1.KUNNR, KNA1.NAME1
ORDER BY 销售总额 DESC
LIMIT 5

cases.question: 销售订单的平均单笔金额是多少
cases.sql:
SELECT AVG(NETWR) AS 平均单笔金额
FROM VBAK

cases.question: 采购订单里最常同时被一起采购的两种物料是哪两种
cases.sql:
SELECT 
    A.MATNR AS 物料1,
    B.MATNR AS 物料2,
    M1.MAKTX AS 物料1名称,
    M2.MAKTX AS 物料2名称,
    COUNT(*) AS 共同出现次数
FROM EKPO A
JOIN EKPO B 
    ON A.EBELN = B.EBELN 
    AND A.EBELP < B.EBELP
LEFT JOIN MAKT M1 
    ON A.MATNR = M1.MATNR AND M1.SPRAS = '1'
LEFT JOIN MAKT M2 
    ON B.MATNR = M2.MATNR AND M2.SPRAS = '1'
GROUP BY A.MATNR, B.MATNR
ORDER BY 共同出现次数 DESC
LIMIT 1

cases.question: 财务凭证里有没有借贷不平衡的记录（每张凭证借方总额应等于贷方总额）
cases.sql:
SELECT 
    BKPF.BUKRS AS 公司代码,
    BKPF.BELNR AS 凭证号,
    BKPF.GJAHR AS 会计年度,
    BKPF.BLART AS 凭证类型,
    BKPF.BUDAT AS 过账日期,
    BKPF.WAERS AS 币种,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN BSEG.SHKZG = 'S' THEN BSEG.DMBTR ELSE 0 END), 2) AS 借方总额,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN BSEG.SHKZG = 'H' THEN BSEG.DMBTR ELSE 0 END), 2) AS 贷方总额,
    ROUND(ABS(SUM(CASE WHEN BSEG.SHKZG = 'S' THEN BSEG.DMBTR ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN BSEG.SHKZG = 'H' THEN BSEG.DMBTR ELSE 0 END)), 2) AS 差额
FROM BSEG
JOIN BKPF ON BSEG.BUKRS = BKPF.BUKRS AND BSEG.BELNR = BKPF.BELNR AND BSEG.GJAHR = BKPF.GJAHR
GROUP BY BKPF.BUKRS, BKPF.BELNR, BKPF.GJAHR, BKPF.BLART, BKPF.BUDAT, BKPF.WAERS
HAVING ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN BSEG.SHKZG = 'S' THEN BSEG.DMBTR ELSE 0 END), 2) <> ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN BSEG.SHKZG = 'H' THEN BSEG.DMBTR ELSE 0 END), 2)
ORDER BY BKPF.BUKRS, BKPF.GJAHR, BKPF.BELNR

cases.question: 销售订单抬头的净额和它所有行项目净额之和不一致的订单有哪些
cases.sql:
SELECT 
    VBAK.VBELN AS 销售订单号,
    VBAK.NETWR AS 抬头净额,
    SUM(VBAP.NETWR) AS 行项目净额合计,
    ROUND(VBAK.NETWR - SUM(VBAP.NETWR), 2) AS 差异金额
FROM VBAK
JOIN VBAP ON VBAK.VBELN = VBAP.VBELN
GROUP BY VBAK.VBELN, VBAK.NETWR
HAVING ROUND(VBAK.NETWR, 2) != ROUND(SUM(VBAP.NETWR), 2)
ORDER BY ABS(VBAK.NETWR - SUM(VBAP.NETWR)) DESC

cases.question: 2026 年销售业绩最好的销售员前 5 名（排除测试账号 TEST 开头的）
cases.sql:
SELECT VBAK.ERNAM AS SALES_REP, SUM(VBAK.NETWR) AS TOTAL_NETWR
FROM VBAK
WHERE VBAK.ERDAT >= '2026-01-01' AND VBAK.ERDAT < '2027-01-01'
  AND VBAK.ERNAM NOT LIKE 'TEST%'
GROUP BY VBAK.ERNAM
ORDER BY TOTAL_NETWR DESC
LIMIT 5
